title: Is Keto Right for You?
intro: Answer 7 quick questions to see how well a ketogenic lifestyle fits your habits, goals, and tastes. This is for fun and general education, not medical advice.

questions.q: How do you usually feel a couple hours after a big pasta or bread-heavy meal?

options.t: Sluggish, foggy, or ready for a nap

questions.q: Could you picture giving up bread, pasta, and sugar most of the time?

options.t: Honestly, yes, I could let them go
It would be hard but doable
No way, those are my favorites

questions.q: How do you feel about fatty foods like avocado, cheese, eggs, and meat?

options.t: Love them, I'd happily eat more

questions.q: What's your main goal right now?
How much of your food do you prepare at home?

options.t: I mostly eat out or grab convenience food

questions.q: Any medical conditions that affect diet (kidney/liver issues, pregnancy, etc.)?

options.t: Yes, I have something to consider

questions.q: How do you usually handle the first week of a big change?

options.t: I push through the rough patch
I need to ease in gradually
I tend to give up quickly

results.title: Keto might not be your easiest path right now
results.body: Based on your answers, a strict ketogenic diet could feel like an uphill battle, and that's completely okay. A gentler low-carb or Mediterranean approach might fit your tastes and routine better while still improving your energy and health. If keto still interests you, start by simply cutting back on added sugar and refined carbs before going all in.

results.title: Keto could work well for you, with a plan
results.body: You have several traits that line up nicely with keto, along with a few areas that would need some planning. The people who succeed on keto in your situation usually start with a clear meal plan and a stocked kitchen so they're never caught without a keto-friendly option. Ease in over a week or two rather than going cold turkey.
results.cta: See a beginner keto meal plan

results.title: You're a strong keto candidate
results.body: Your habits, goals, and food preferences all point toward keto being a great fit. You're likely to adapt quickly and feel the energy and appetite benefits within the first couple of weeks. Start by learning which foods to lean on and which to avoid, then build a simple repeatable rotation of meals you enjoy.

disclaimer: This quiz is for general education and fun, not medical advice. Talk to your doctor before making major dietary changes, especially if you have a health condition.
